from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about an athlete into a single fluent sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple mapping from predicate to a natural‑language fragment.
    phrase_map = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "height": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {o} metres tall",
        "weight": lambda s, o: f"{s} weighs {o}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "currentclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "formerTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} formerly played for {o}",
        "position": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays as a {o}",
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} competes in the {o} league",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{s} is managed by {o}",
        "coach": lambda s, o: f"{s} is coached by {o}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s home ground is {o}",
        "stadium": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s stadium is {o}",
        "draftYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted in {o}",
        "draftRound": lambda s, o: f"{s} was selected in round {o}",
        "draftPick": lambda s, o: f"{s} was the {o}th pick",
        "college": lambda s, o: f"{s} attended {o}",
        "youthclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} started at youth club {o}",
        "playerNumber": lambda s, o: f"{s} wears number {o}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} started his professional career in {o}",
        "debutTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} debuted with {o}",
        "currentteam": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "draftTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted by {o}",
        # Fallback for any other predicate
        "default": lambda s, p, o: f"{s} {p} {o}",
    }

    # Group objects by (subject, predicate) to collapse repeats.
    grouped = {}
    for triple in triples:
        key = (triple.subject, triple.predicate)
        grouped.setdefault(key, []).append(triple.object)

    # Build a clause for each (subject, predicate) pair.
    clauses = []
    for (subj, pred), objs in grouped.items():
        # Join multiple objects with commas and "and".
        if len(objs) == 1:
            obj_str = objs[0]
        else:
            obj_str = ", ".join(objs[:-1]) + f", and {objs[-1]}"
        formatter = phrase_map.get(pred, None)
        if formatter:
            try:
                clause = formatter(subj, obj_str)
            except TypeError:
                clause = phrase_map["default"](subj, pred, obj_str)
        else:
            clause = phrase_map["default"](subj, pred, obj_str)
        clauses.append(clause)

    # Combine clauses into one fluent sentence.
    if not clauses:
        return ""
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    elif len(clauses) == 2:
        sentence = f"{clauses[0]} and {clauses[1]}."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + f", and {clauses[-1]}."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
